notes: Solid breakout implementation with proper ball physics, brick collision, lives/scoring, and level progression, but ball launch angle uses 240-300° range which can send ball sideways/downward initially, and the title screen unnecessarily mutates bricks state via createBricks().
An exceptionally well-crafted Breakout clone with flawless collision detection, excellent paddle control mechanics, sound effects, and polished game states.
A solid and mostly complete Breakout clone, but title rendering mutates game state by recreating bricks every frame and collision/flow details are simplistic enough to prevent a higher score.
